'''Challon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] that remained neutral during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. While on Challon, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] tried to convince local [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Tchai]] to support the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Organa was forced to kill [[Giles Durane]], her "[[Weapons master/Legends|weapons master]]," in self-defense.

The people of Challon often referred to inhabitants of planets in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] derisively as "[[Rimworlders]]."
